opencodeCommands.name: openagents-review
opencodeCommands.description: Perform code review on a file or path
opencodeCommands.promptTemplate:
Perform a comprehensive code review on the following file or path. Check for correctness, security vulnerabilities, performance issues, and style problems.

Target:

opencodeCommands.name: openagents-test
opencodeCommands.promptTemplate:
Run the test suite and analyze results. If tests fail, identify the root cause and propose specific fixes.

Scope:

opencodeCommands.name: openagents-implement
opencodeCommands.description: Implement a feature from a spec
opencodeCommands.promptTemplate:
Implement the following feature or change according to the specification. Read existing code first and follow project conventions.

Spec:

opencodeCommands.name: openagents-docs
opencodeCommands.promptTemplate:
Generate or update documentation for the following target. Documentation must accurately reflect actual code behavior.

Target:

opencodeCommands.name: openagents-explore
opencodeCommands.description: Map architecture, entrypoints, and ownership of a target
opencodeCommands.promptTemplate:
Explore the following target. Map the entrypoints, major abstractions, neighboring modules, and likely change points. Keep the result evidence-first and scoped to understanding.

Target:

opencodeCommands.name: openagents-trace
opencodeCommands.description: Trace a symbol, dependency edge, or data flow
opencodeCommands.promptTemplate:
Trace the following symbol, file, or interface end-to-end. Report upstream callers or dependencies, downstream consumers or effects, and the main impact points.

Target:

opencodeCommands.name: openagents-debug
opencodeCommands.description: Investigate a failure without drifting into implementation
opencodeCommands.promptTemplate:
Debug the following failure or symptom. Reproduce the likely path from available evidence, narrow the root cause, and report the strongest verified or suspected explanation without changing code.

Failure:

opencodeCommands.name: openagents-plan-feature
opencodeCommands.description: Break down a feature into tasks
opencodeCommands.promptTemplate:
Break down the following feature into concrete implementation tasks. Include dependencies, risks, and complexity assessment.

Feature:

opencodeCommands.name: openagents-plan-refactor
opencodeCommands.description: Plan a refactoring with impact analysis
opencodeCommands.promptTemplate:
Plan the following refactoring. Analyze impact, identify affected files, and outline a migration path with rollback strategy.

Refactoring:

opencodeCommands.name: openagents-audit
opencodeCommands.description: Security audit of a file, module, or API surface
opencodeCommands.promptTemplate:
Perform a security-focused audit of the following target. Prioritize: authentication gaps, input validation failures, injection vulnerabilities, secret exposure, authorization bypasses, and dependency CVEs. Every finding requires file:line citation and a specific fix. Flag BLOCKING issues that must be resolved before production deployment.

Target:

opencodeCommands.name: openagents-ship
opencodeCommands.promptTemplate:
End-to-end delivery of the following feature or fix:
1. Read current state and confirm understanding of the specification
2. Implement using @hephaestus
3. Run tests using @atalanta — do not proceed if tests fail
4. Review code using @nemesis — resolve all BLOCKING findings before proceeding
5. Update documentation using @calliope
6. Report: files changed, test status, review verdict, and any remaining manual steps
7. Remind the user to commit manually — auto-commit is forbidden

Feature or fix:

codexModes.prompt: Use openagentsbtw. Route this through hermes-style exploration on the codex-mini profile. Keep the result concise, evidence-driven, and scoped to bounded search or classification.

Use openagentsbtw plus the explore skill. Route this through hermes-style repo exploration on the codex-mini profile. Map architecture, entrypoints, ownership, and likely change points. Keep the result concise and evidence-driven.

Use openagentsbtw plus the trace skill. Route this through hermes-style tracing on the codex-mini profile. Follow a symbol, dependency path, or data flow end-to-end and report upstream, downstream, and impact points.

Use openagentsbtw plus the debug skill. Route this through hermes-style investigation on the codex-mini profile. Narrow the failure, separate verified evidence from suspicion, and do not drift into implementation.

Use openagentsbtw. Route this through hermes-style exploration on the codex-mini profile. Use DeepWiki MCP tools first for public GitHub repository understanding, then verify exact local file or line claims with repo reads before stating them. Keep the result concise, evidence-driven, and scoped to exploration.
Use openagentsbtw. Route this through calliope-style documentation work on the codex-mini profile. Keep prose factual, terse, and free of filler.
Use openagentsbtw. Route this through calliope plus the desloppify skill on the codex-mini profile. Remove AI filler, sycophancy, narrating comments, and optional-offer boilerplate.
Use openagentsbtw. Route this through calliope for writing and hermes for exact repo state on the codex-mini profile. Keep the summary compact and operational.
Use openagentsbtw. Route this through atalanta-style targeted validation on the codex-mini profile. Run and analyze; do not drift into implementation.

Use openagentsbtw. Route planning through athena-style architecture analysis on the main profile. Treat native /plan as reasoning mode only, not role selection. Lead with the recommendation and keep the plan concrete.

Use openagentsbtw. Route implementation through hephaestus-style execution on the sandboxed auto-accept profile. This mode keeps workspace-write sandboxing but does not pause for edit approvals. Complete the requested work, avoid placeholders, avoid unnecessary fallbacks, and keep comments to non-obvious why.

Use openagentsbtw. Route implementation through hephaestus-style execution on the main profile. Complete the requested work, avoid placeholders, avoid unnecessary fallbacks, and keep comments to non-obvious why.
Use openagentsbtw. Route review through nemesis-style analysis on the main profile. Lead with findings, cite evidence, and focus on correctness, regressions, security, and missing tests.
Use openagentsbtw. Route multi-step coordination through odysseus-style orchestration on the main profile. Delegate only bounded work and track step ownership explicitly.
